# nodus-mcp

> MCP (Model Context Protocol) library for Nodus — bidirectional client and server.
> Part of the [Masterplan Infinite Weave](https://www.the-master-plan.com/) ecosystem.
> Created by Shawn Knight.

nodus-mcp implements the MCP 2026-07-28 RC specification as a Nodus companion library.
It provides a full bidirectional client+server with stdio and HTTP transports, bearer-token
authentication, elicitation (MRTR loop), roots, and sampling. nodus-mcp makes Nodus scripts
capable of connecting to any MCP-compatible AI tool server (Claude, GitHub Copilot, etc.)
and of exposing Nodus tool registries to MCP clients.

## Status

v0.1.0 — prepared, not yet published. 361 tests passing.
OAuth 2.0 + PKCE support planned for v1.0 (see `/nodus-mcp-oauth` skill).

## Key Documents

- [README.md](README.md): Install, connect to a server, expose tools, transports
- [docs/design/00-decisions.md](docs/design/00-decisions.md): Phase 0 decisions — target spec, transport scope, auth model
- [docs/design/01-adapter-mapping.md](docs/design/01-adapter-mapping.md): std:tool → MCP tool projection
- [docs/design/06-embedding-runtime-blockers.md](docs/design/06-embedding-runtime-blockers.md): EMBED-001–004 analysis

## Install

```
pip install nodus-mcp  # once published
pip install -e . --no-deps  # dev install
```

## Usage in Nodus

```nodus
import "nodus-mcp" as mcp

let client = mcp.client()
let conn = client.connect("https://mcp.example.com", bearer_token="sk-...")
let tools = conn.tools()
```

## Core Constraints

- Target spec: MCP 2026-07-28 RC (stateless; no session init handshake)
- Transports: stdio (full) + HTTP (stateless)
- Auth: bearer token only in v0.1; OAuth + PKCE in v1.0
- Tool namespace: `mcp.<alias>.<tool_name>`
- Server-initiated capabilities (roots, sampling) suppressed over HTTP (TD-007)

## Ecosystem

- nodus-lang: https://github.com/Masterplanner25/Nodus (required dep)
- nodus-mcp-oauth skill: `.claude/commands/nodus-mcp-oauth.md` in nodus-lang repo
- Masterplan Infinite Weave: https://www.the-master-plan.com/
